features.name: Free Industrial Tools for Every Filipino Worker
Digital Maintenance Logbook
features.capability: Foundation layer. Every repair, every failure, every fix recorded — by typing, by voice, or by voice command. Without it everything else is guesswork.

features.name: Spare-Parts Inventory
features.capability: Readiness layer. Maintenance only works if the part is there. Low stock alerts before surprises happen — and Auto-Staging now reserves parts in advance for predicted failures.

features.name: Maintenance Day Planner
features.capability: Scheduling layer. Right person, right task, right time. Plans the week so PMs never pile up.

features.name: Hive Live Board
features.capability: Visibility layer. The manager sees everything in real time: open work, downtime, PM rate, all in one screen.

features.name: PM Scheduler
features.capability: Prevention layer. Stops failures before they happen. Each completed PM feeds the logbook, the dashboard, and the shift plan.

features.name: Community
features.capability: Knowledge layer. Plant workers sharing solutions. Best answers feed the AI and the knowledge base.

features.name: Analytics Engine
features.capability: Insight layer. Turns raw maintenance data into OEE, MTBF, downtime trends across 4 phases — Descriptive, Diagnostic, Predictive, Prescriptive.

features.name: AI Work Assistant
features.capability: Intelligence layer. Turns recorded data into answers. The more the logbook grows, the smarter the AI gets.

features.name: Philippine Industrial Intelligence Report
features.capability: Benchmark layer. Compares your plant's KPIs against Philippine industry peers. Shows where you lead and where you lag.

features.name: Asset Hub
features.capability: Asset memory layer. Every machine's full lifetime in one Asset 360 view — failures, PMs, parts, sister assets, parent plant. ISO 14224 hierarchy.

features.name: Alert Hub
features.capability: Attention layer. One inbox for everything that needs action: critical risk spikes, overdue PMs, low stock, failure signature alerts.

features.name: Audit Log
features.capability: Trust layer. Every supervisor action and worker action recorded with timestamp + actor. Auditable for ISO/regulator review, transparent for the team, defensible if anything is ever questioned.

features.name: Shift Brain
features.capability: Shift intelligence layer. AI generates the next shift's plan before sign-on: top risks, due PMs, carry-overs from previous shift, parts to pre-stage, who does what.

features.name: Engineering Design Calculator
features.capability: Standards layer. Every calculation done to Philippine engineering standards. Results saved as permanent reference.

features.name: Project Manager
features.capability: Coordination layer. Long-running maintenance projects (overhauls, shutdowns, capex) tracked end-to-end with milestones, parts staging, skill assignments.

features.name: Skill Matrix
features.capability: Competency layer. Knows who can do what. Prevents assigning a job to someone untrained. Identifies gaps before they become safety risks.

features.name: Resume / CV Builder
features.capability: Career layer. Turns real logged work and verified skills into an ATS-ready resume. Every repair you log becomes proof on paper - career protection in the AI era.

features.name: Marketplace
features.capability: Supply layer. When inventory hits critical, the marketplace connects you to verified sellers across Philippine plants.

features.name: CMMS Integration
features.capability: Bridge layer. Two-way sync with SAP PM, IBM Maximo, Fiix and other CMMS systems. Use WorkHive without abandoning existing investment.

features.name: Achievements
features.capability: Recognition layer. Levels, XP, and badges for every closed logbook entry, completed PM, helpful community answer. Makes maintenance work feel like progress.

features.name: Predictive Analytics
features.capability: Foresight layer. ML scores every asset by failure risk, real reliability math (Weibull, P-F intervals, FMEA) backs the model, and Auto-Staging reserves the parts before the failure happens. Predict, prepare, prevent.

features.name: Shift Handover Report
features.capability: Continuity layer. Nothing falls through the cracks between shifts. Open issues, hot machines, pending PMs all transferred.

index.software_description: Free industrial intelligence tools for every worker, from field to management: logbook, PM checklist, inventory management, skill matrix, and AI work assistant.
